title: NitrousOxide
modalContent: Developed with TypeScript, Fastify, and Next.js, NitrousOxide is a research project focused on the fundamentals of open-source intelligence (OSINT) through HTTP requests to public APIs.

title: VOLT
modalContent: A full-stack solution for authentication and authorization, built with Fastify, Next.js, and MongoDB, powering a seamless non-KYC crypto-to-fiat exchange platform.
